2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.1.10 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3027.issue: [W3027] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": testing for OS windows, macos is missing in job "adapter-tests". Add corresponding tests to "test-and-release.yml" or adapt [package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.upnp/blob/master/package.json) "os" accordingly.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/upnp-subscription.js, [main.js](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.upnp/blob/master/main.js)). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5048.issue: [W5048] ".prettierignore" is most likely obsolete when using "@iobroker/eslint-config". Please remove it.

5512.issue: [W5512] admin/jsonCustom.json schema validation error: Unknown property "hidden" in root

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

8005.issue: [W8005] Latest GitHub release tag (v1.1.7) does not match latest npm version (1.1.10).

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm", "github-actions") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

0082.issue: [S0082] Package "portfinder" (dependencies) can be updated from 1.0.32 to 1.0.38. The newer version has been published for 261 days. Please evaluate updating [package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.upnp/blob/master/package.json).

0087.issue: [S0087] Missing "/tsconfig.json". Consider adding it for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.upnp/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.upnp/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
